calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GABRIEL LEE-SANCHEZ, Esq. of Keesal, Young & Logan (Tel: 415-398-6000) for Petitioner Wells Fargo Cleaning Services, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's "petition to confirm arbitration award" is granted; no timely opposition filed.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
